message:
fix(test): strengthen validate E2E test assertions

- Add missing evidence field to LLMIO mock for completeness
- Add explicit assertions before conditional checks in outcome
  classification tests to ensure evidence array is defined
- Improves test reliability by not silently passing on empty evidence
